headline: 2 Reasons to Like COIN (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: Coinbase’s stock price has taken a beating over the past six months, shedding 55% of its value and falling to $174.10 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Bitcoin Price Falls. Why Faltering Iran Cease-Fire Could Crush Cryptos.
summary: Bitcoin hit its highest level since mid-March, with Ethereum and XRP also rising on news of a U.S.-Iran cease-fire.
